info.title: Sorcha.Cli
info.description: Administrative CLI tool for managing Sorcha distributed ledger platform

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Sorcha CLI - Administrative tool for managing Sorcha distributed ledger platform

options.name: --profile
options.description: Configuration profile to use (uses active profile from config if not specified)

options.name: --create-sp
options.description: Create service principal for automation [default: False]

options.name: --non-interactive
options.description: Non-interactive mode (all options must be provided) [default: False]

options.name: --subdomain
options.description: Unique subdomain (3-50 alphanumeric characters with hyphens)

commands.name: list
commands.description: List all users in an organization

commands.name: create
commands.description: Create a new user in an organization

options.name: --roles
options.description: Comma-separated list of roles (replaces existing roles)

commands.name: list
commands.description: List all service principals in an organization

commands.name: get
commands.description: Get a service principal by client ID

commands.name: create
commands.description: Create a new service principal in an organization

commands.name: rotate-secret
commands.description: Rotate the client secret for a service principal

commands.name: login
commands.description: Authenticate as a user or service principal

options.name: --password
options.description: Password for user authentication (INSECURE - use interactive mode instead)

options.name: --client-id
options.description: Client ID for service principal authentication

options.name: --client-secret
options.description: Client secret for service principal authentication (INSECURE - use interactive mode instead)

options.name: --interactive
options.description: Use interactive login (prompts for credentials securely) [default: True]

options.name: --profile
options.description: Profile to authenticate with (defaults to active profile)

options.name: --all
options.description: Clear tokens for all profiles (default: current profile only) [default: False]

options.name: --profile
options.description: Profile to logout from (defaults to active profile)

commands.name: status
commands.description: Check authentication status for the current profile

options.name: --profile
options.description: Profile to check status for (defaults to active profile)

options.name: --owner-wallet
options.description: Owner wallet address for signing attestation

options.name: --advertise
options.description: Whether to advertise on peer network (true/false)

commands.name: blueprints
commands.description: List blueprints on the system register

commands.name: submit
commands.description: Submit a new transaction to a register

commands.name: status
commands.description: Get the status of a transaction

options.name: --word-count
options.description: Number of words in mnemonic (12, 15, 18, 21, or 24) [default: 12]

commands.name: recover
commands.description: Recover a wallet from mnemonic phrase

options.name: --passphrase
options.description: Optional passphrase if one was used during creation

commands.name: sign
commands.description: Sign data with a wallet's private key

commands.name: list
commands.description: List all dockets in a register

commands.name: wallet
commands.description: Query transactions by wallet address (sender or recipient)

commands.name: sender
commands.description: Query transactions by sender wallet address

commands.name: peer
commands.description: Monitor peer network and node health

commands.name: list
commands.description: List all known peers in the network

commands.name: get
commands.description: Get detailed information about a specific peer

commands.name: quality
commands.description: Display connection quality scores for all peers

commands.name: subscriptions
commands.description: List register subscriptions and sync progress

commands.name: subscribe
commands.description: Subscribe to a register for replication

commands.name: create
commands.description: Create a blueprint from a JSON file

commands.name: publish
commands.description: Publish a blueprint to a register

commands.name: register
commands.description: Register a new participant in an organization

commands.name: wallet-link
commands.description: Initiate a wallet link challenge for a participant

options.name: --expires-in-days
options.description: Number of days until credential expires

commands.name: present
commands.description: Present a credential to a verifier

options.name: --claims
options.description: Comma-separated list of claims to present (selective disclosure)

commands.name: status
commands.description: Get the status of a credential

commands.name: process
commands.description: Process pending transactions for a register

commands.name: integrity-check
commands.description: Run integrity check on a register's chain

commands.name: refresh
commands.description: Refresh the validator list for a register

commands.name: setup
commands.description: Set up threshold signing for a register

options.name: --service-url
options.description: Base URL for all services (recommended - e.g., 'http://localhost')

options.name: --check-connectivity
options.description: Verify connectivity to service URLs [default: True]

arguments.name: name
arguments.description: Name of the profile to activate
